title: Remove the built-in runner: tk run command and runner-only packages
description:
Context: execution moved to Claude Code orchestration; tk run is unused. Delete the runner-only stack (~17-19k LOC).

DELETE:
- cmd/tk/cmd/run.go (the tk run command)
- internal/engine/ (~8.7k LOC run loop)
- internal/wrapup/ (~2.9k)
- internal/output/ (~2.6k, runner live-status sinks)
- internal/runstate/ (~2.0k, only imported by internal/output/status_sink.go)
- internal/runlog/ (~1.3k)
- internal/budget/ (~1.1k)
- internal/wave/runner.go + runner_test.go (wave EXECUTION; imports internal/agent + internal/runrecord)

KEEP (verified non-runner dependents):
- internal/wave/wave.go + wave_test.go - wave PLANNING, used by cmd/tk/cmd/graph.go and internal/query/roadmap.go
- internal/worktree (tk merge), internal/context (tk context), internal/gc (tk gc), internal/config (tk init/create)
- internal/agent and internal/runrecord - still imported by internal/tickboard/server and internal/ticks/client.go; their fate is a separate decision-gated tick. Do NOT delete them here; only trim runner-only call sites in internal/ticks/client.go that reference deleted packages (e.g. the engine interface reference near client.go:819).

REPO GOTCHA (from .tick/learnings.md): cmd/tk/main.go has a legacy routing switch with a hard-coded case list plus usage text - remove the 'run' case and its usage lines there too, not just the cobra registration.

Also sweep docs: grep -rn 'tk run' README.md docs/ skills/ and remove or rewrite references to the built-in runner (the skills/ticks note that the standalone runner exists should be dropped or updated to say it was removed).

Verification:
- go build ./... && go test ./... fully green
- grep -rn 'internal/engine|internal/wrapup|internal/output|internal/runstate|internal/runlog|internal/budget' --include='*.go' . returns nothing
- ./tk run (built binary) reports unknown command; tk graph <epic> and tk merge --help still work

Files likely touched: the deletions above, cmd/tk/main.go, internal/ticks/client.go, README.md, docs/, skills/ticks/, go.mod/go.sum (tidy).
acceptance_criteria: Runner packages and tk run deleted with no dangling imports (grep clean); wave planning, merge, graph, board still build and their tests pass; main.go switch and usage text updated
